mapper.sql: id, refund_sn, order_id, order_sn, payment_record_id, member_id, member_username, refund_amount, refund_reason, status, apply_time, audit_time, auditor_id, auditor_name, audit_note, third_party_refund_id, refund_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund_request WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM refund_request WHERE order_sn = #{orderSn} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE refund_request SET status = #{status}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, auditor_name = #{auditorName}, audit_note = #{auditNote}, third_party_refund_id = #{thirdPartyRefundId}, refund_time = #{refundTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE refund_request SET status = #{status},
third_party_refund_id = #{thirdPartyRefundId},
audit_note = #{failureReason},
refund_time = NOW(),
update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund_request WHERE status = #{status} AND third_party_refund_id IS NOT NULL AND update_time < NOW() - (#{timeoutHours} * INTERVAL '1 hour') ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update:
UPDATE refund_request SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM refund_request WHERE order_sn = #{paymentTransactionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
